russian: Electric water pump with 50L tank. 50 u/s.

english: Kit to deploy an incinerator furnace.

original: Burns items to generate 50 u/s of power.
english: Burns items to generate 50 u/s of power.
spanish: Quema objetos para generar 50 u/s de energía.
german: Verbrennt Gegenstände um 50 u/s Strom zu erzeugen.
russian: Сжигает предметы для генерации 50 ед/с энергии.

original: An automated item sorter. Place near a container to link.
english: An automated item sorter. Place near a container to link.
spanish: Un clasificador automatico de items. Colocar cerca de un contenedor.
german: Ein automatischer Gegenstandssortierer. In der Naehe eines Behaelters platzieren.
russian: Автоматический сортировщик предметов. Размещайте рядом с контейнером.

original: Sorts items from its linked container to downstream containers based on filter rules. Requires power.
english: Sorts items from its linked container to downstream containers based on filter rules. Requires power.
spanish: Clasifica items del contenedor vinculado a contenedores conectados segun reglas de filtro. Requiere electricidad.
german: Sortiert Gegenstaende aus dem verknuepften Behaelter in nachgeschaltete Behaelter basierend auf Filterregeln. Benoetigt Strom.
russian: Сортирует предметы из связанного контейнера в подключённые контейнеры по правилам фильтрации. Требуется питание.

original: A powerful directional searchlight. Place to deploy.
english: A powerful directional searchlight. Place to deploy.
spanish: Un potente reflector direccional. Colocar para desplegar.
german: Ein leistungsstarker Suchscheinwerfer. Platzieren zum Aufstellen.
russian: Мощный направленный прожектор. Установите для развертывания.

original: A tripod-mounted searchlight. Requires 25 u/s of power.
english: A tripod-mounted searchlight. Requires 25 u/s of power.
spanish: Reflector montado en tripode. Requiere 25 u/s de energia.
german: Ein auf einem Stativ montierter Suchscheinwerfer. Benoetigt 25 u/s Strom.
russian: Прожектор на треноге. Требуется 25 ед/с энергии.

original: A motion sensor module. Place to deploy.
english: A motion sensor module. Place to deploy.
spanish: Modulo sensor de movimiento. Coloca para desplegar.
russian: Модуль датчика движения. Установите для развертывания.

original: Detects nearby players and allows power through. Requires 5 u/s.
english: Detects nearby players and allows power through. Requires 5 u/s.
spanish: Detecta jugadores cercanos y permite el paso de corriente. Requiere 5 u/s.
german: Erkennt Spieler in der Naehe und laesst Strom durch. Benoetigt 5 u/s.
russian: Обнаруживает ближайших игроков и пропускает ток. Требуется 5 ед/с.

original: A latching lever switch. Place to deploy.
english: A latching lever switch. Place to deploy.
spanish: Un interruptor de palanca. Coloca para desplegar.

original: A latching toggle switch with LED status indicator.
english: A latching toggle switch with LED status indicator.
spanish: Un interruptor de palanca con indicador LED.

original: A logic gate. Output active when BOTH inputs receive power.
english: A logic gate. Output active when BOTH inputs receive power.
spanish: Puerta lógica. Salida activa cuando AMBAS entradas reciben energía.
german: Ein Logik-Gatter. Ausgang aktiv wenn BEIDE Eingänge Strom erhalten.
russian: Логический вентиль. Выход активен при питании ОБОИХ входов.

original: A logic gate. Output active when ANY input receives power.
english: A logic gate. Output active when ANY input receives power.
spanish: Puerta lógica. Salida activa cuando CUALQUIER entrada recibe energía.
german: Ein Logik-Gatter. Ausgang aktiv wenn EIN Eingang Strom erhält.
russian: Логический вентиль. Выход активен при питании ЛЮБОГО входа.

original: A logic gate. Output active when EXACTLY ONE input receives power.
english: A logic gate. Output active when EXACTLY ONE input receives power.
spanish: Puerta lógica. Salida activa cuando EXACTAMENTE UNA entrada recibe energía.
german: Ein Logik-Gatter. Ausgang aktiv wenn GENAU EIN Eingang Strom erhält.
russian: Логический вентиль. Выход активен при питании РОВНО ОДНОГО входа.

original: Logic gate: output ON when both inputs powered. 20 u/s capacity.
english: Logic gate: output ON when both inputs powered. 20 u/s capacity.
spanish: Puerta lógica: salida activa con ambas entradas alimentadas. 20 u/s.
german: Logik-Gatter: Ausgang AN wenn beide Eingänge versorgt. 20 u/s.
russian: Логический вентиль: выход ВКЛ при питании обоих входов. 20 ед/с.

original: Logic gate: output ON when any input powered. 20 u/s capacity.
english: Logic gate: output ON when any input powered. 20 u/s capacity.
spanish: Puerta lógica: salida activa con cualquier entrada alimentada. 20 u/s.
german: Logik-Gatter: Ausgang AN wenn ein Eingang versorgt. 20 u/s.
russian: Логический вентиль: выход ВКЛ при питании любого входа. 20 ед/с.

original: Logic gate: output ON when exactly one input powered. 20 u/s capacity.
english: Logic gate: output ON when exactly one input powered. 20 u/s capacity.
spanish: Puerta lógica: salida activa con exactamente una entrada alimentada. 20 u/s.
german: Logik-Gatter: Ausgang AN wenn genau ein Eingang versorgt. 20 u/s.
russian: Логический вентиль: выход ВКЛ при питании ровно одного входа. 20 ед/с.

original: A floor-mounted pressure pad. Place to deploy.
english: A floor-mounted pressure pad. Place to deploy.
spanish: Placa de presión para suelo. Coloca para desplegar.
russian: Напольная нажимная плита. Разместите для установки.

original: Passes power when a player stands on it. 20 u/s capacity.
english: Passes power when a player stands on it. 20 u/s capacity.
spanish: Transmite energía cuando un jugador pisa sobre ella. 20 u/s.
german: Leitet Strom wenn ein Spieler darauf steht. 20 E/s.
russian: Передаёт энергию, когда игрок стоит на ней. 20 ед/с.

original: A wall-mounted laser tripwire. Place to deploy.
english: A wall-mounted laser tripwire. Place to deploy.
spanish: Cable trampa láser de pared. Coloca para desplegar.
german: Ein wandmontierter Laser-Stolperdraht. Platzieren zum Aufstellen.
russian: Настенный лазерный датчик. Разместите для установки.

original: Passes power when a player crosses the laser beam. 20 u/s capacity.
english: Passes power when a player crosses the laser beam. 20 u/s capacity.
spanish: Transmite energía cuando un jugador cruza el rayo láser. 20 u/s.
german: Leitet Strom wenn ein Spieler den Laserstrahl kreuzt. 20 E/s.
russian: Передаёт энергию, когда игрок пересекает лазерный луч. 20 ед/с.

original: A 7-segment electronic counter. Place to deploy.
english: A 7-segment electronic counter. Place to deploy.
spanish: Contador electrónico de 7 segmentos. Coloca para desplegar.

original: Counts 0-9. Toggle input increments. Pulses output on 9→0 wrap. 20 u/s, 5 u/s self-consumption.
english: Counts 0-9. Toggle input increments. Pulses output on 9→0 wrap. 20 u/s, 5 u/s self-consumption.
spanish: Cuenta 0-9. Entrada toggle incrementa. Pulso de salida al pasar de 9→0. 20 u/s, 5 u/s autoconsumo.
german: Zählt 0-9. Toggle-Eingang erhöht. Ausgangsimpuls bei 9→0. 20 E/s, 5 E/s Eigenverbrauch.
russian: Считает 0-9. Вход toggle увеличивает. Импульс на выходе при 9→0. 20 ед/с, 5 ед/с потребление.

original: A medium UPS battery with charge indicator. Place to deploy.

german: Eine mittlere USV-Batterie mit Ladeanzeige. Platzieren zum Aufstellen.
russian: Средняя батарея ИБП с индикатором заряда. Установите для развертывания.

original: 10,000 u capacity. Charges from surplus, discharges when needed. 50 chg / 70 dis.
english: 10,000 u capacity. Charges from surplus, discharges when needed. 50 chg / 70 dis.
spanish: Capacidad 10.000 u. Carga del excedente, descarga cuando se necesita. 50 carga / 70 descarga.
german: 10.000 u Kapazität. Lädt aus Überschuss, entlädt bei Bedarf. 50 Ladung / 70 Entladung.
russian: Ёмкость 10 000 ед. Заряжается от излишков, разряжается по необходимости. 50 заряд / 70 разряд.

original: A large industrial battery bank. Place to deploy.
english: A large industrial battery bank. Place to deploy.
spanish: Un banco de baterías industrial grande. Colocar para desplegar.
german: Eine große industrielle Batteriebank. Platzieren zum Aufstellen.
russian: Большой промышленный аккумуляторный блок. Установите для развертывания.

original: 50,000 u capacity. Charges from surplus, discharges when needed. 80 chg / 120 dis.
english: 50,000 u capacity. Charges from surplus, discharges when needed. 80 chg / 120 dis.
spanish: Capacidad 50.000 u. Carga del excedente, descarga cuando se necesita. 80 carga / 120 descarga.
german: 50.000 u Kapazität. Lädt aus Überschuss, entlädt bei Bedarf. 80 Ladung / 120 Entladung.
russian: Ёмкость 50 000 ед. Заряжается от излишков, разряжается по необходимости. 80 заряд / 120 разряд.

original: An electronic controller that opens a nearby door when powered. Place near a door to deploy.
english: An electronic controller that opens a nearby door when powered. Place near a door to deploy.
spanish: Un controlador electrónico que abre la puerta cercana cuando recibe energía. Colocar cerca de una puerta.
german: Ein elektronischer Controller, der eine nahegelegene Tür öffnet wenn mit Strom versorgt. In der Nähe einer Tür platzieren.
russian: Электронный контроллер, открывающий ближайшую дверь при наличии питания. Установите рядом с дверью.

original: Controls the nearest door within 1m. Opens when powered, closes when unpowered. Works with all lock types.
english: Controls the nearest door within 1m. Opens when powered, closes when unpowered. Works with all lock types.
spanish: Controla la puerta más cercana en 1m. Abre con energía, cierra sin energía. Compatible con todos los candados.
german: Steuert die nächste Tür im Umkreis von 1m. Öffnet bei Strom, schließt ohne Strom. Funktioniert mit allen Schlosstypen.
russian: Управляет ближайшей дверью в радиусе 1м. Открывает при питании, закрывает без питания. Совместим со всеми замками.

original: A radio intercom with RF toggle capability. Place to deploy.
english: A radio intercom with RF toggle capability. Place to deploy.

russian: Радиоинтерком с возможностью RF-переключения. Установите для развертывания.

original: RF broadcaster. Toggle nearby RF devices. Install a radio for bidirectional VOIP. 10 u/s (T1), 20 u/s (T2).
english: RF broadcaster. Toggle nearby RF devices. Install a radio for bidirectional VOIP. 10 u/s (T1), 20 u/s (T2).
spanish: Transmisor RF. Activa dispositivos RF cercanos. Instala una radio para VOIP bidireccional. 10 u/s (T1), 20 u/s (T2).
german: RF-Sender. Schaltet nahe RF-Geräte um. Radio für bidirektionales VOIP installieren. 10 E/s (T1), 20 E/s (T2).
russian: RF-передатчик. Переключает ближайшие RF-устройства. Установите радио для двустороннего VOIP. 10 ед/с (T1), 20 ед/с (T2).

original: A stateful memory cell. Toggle, Set, Reset inputs control output routing.
english: A stateful memory cell. Toggle, Set, Reset inputs control output routing.
spanish: Célula de memoria con estado. Entradas Toggle, Set, Reset controlan el enrutamiento de salida.
german: Zustandsbehaftete Speicherzelle. Toggle-, Set-, Reset-Eingänge steuern das Ausgangs-Routing.
russian: Ячейка памяти с состоянием. Входы Toggle, Set, Reset управляют маршрутизацией выхода.

original: Stateful latch: 4 inputs (power, toggle, reset, set) + 2 outputs (normal, inverted). 20 u/s capacity.
english: Stateful latch: 4 inputs (power, toggle, reset, set) + 2 outputs (normal, inverted). 20 u/s capacity.
spanish: Latch con estado: 4 entradas (alimentación, toggle, reset, set) + 2 salidas (normal, invertida). 20 u/s.
german: Zustandsspeicher: 4 Eingänge (Strom, Toggle, Reset, Set) + 2 Ausgänge (normal, invertiert). 20 u/s.
russian: Защёлка: 4 входа (питание, переключение, сброс, установка) + 2 выхода (нормальный, инвертированный). 20 ед/с.

original: An electrical toggle switch with antenna. Can be toggled remotely via RF signal from an Intercom.
english: An electrical toggle switch with antenna. Can be toggled remotely via RF signal from an Intercom.
spanish: Un interruptor de palanca con antena. Se puede activar remotamente por RF desde un Intercomunicador.
german: An electrical toggle switch with antenna. Can be toggled remotely via RF signal from an Intercom.
russian: An electrical toggle switch with antenna. Can be toggled remotely via RF signal from an Intercom.

original: A lever toggle switch with LED indicator and antenna. Passes or blocks power. Can be toggled remotely via RF.
english: A lever toggle switch with LED indicator and antenna. Passes or blocks power. Can be toggled remotely via RF.
spanish: Un interruptor de palanca con LED indicador y antena. Pasa o bloquea corriente. Se puede activar remotamente por RF.
german: A lever toggle switch with LED indicator and antenna. Passes or blocks power. Can be toggled remotely via RF.
russian: A lever toggle switch with LED indicator and antenna. Passes or blocks power. Can be toggled remotely via RF.

original: A kit to deploy a powered fridge. Connect to the power grid to keep food cold.
english: A kit to deploy a powered fridge. Connect to the power grid to keep food cold.
spanish: Kit para desplegar una nevera eléctrica. Conéctala a la red para mantener la comida fría.
german: Ein Bausatz für einen Kühlschrank. An das Stromnetz anschließen, um Lebensmittel kalt zu halten.
russian: Набор для установки холодильника. Подключите к электросети для охлаждения продуктов.

original: A powered fridge that keeps food and drinks cold at 5C. Requires 20 u/s from the power grid. Close the door for cooling.
english: A powered fridge that keeps food and drinks cold at 5C. Requires 20 u/s from the power grid. Close the door for cooling.
spanish: Nevera eléctrica que mantiene comida y bebida a 5C. Requiere 20 u/s de la red eléctrica. Cierra la puerta para enfriar.
german: Ein Kühlschrank, der Lebensmittel bei 5°C kühlt. Benötigt 20 E/s aus dem Stromnetz. Tür schließen zum Kühlen.
russian: Холодильник, поддерживающий температуру 5°C. Требует 20 ед/с. Закройте дверь для охлаждения.

original: A momentary push button with RF antenna. Place to deploy.
english: A momentary push button with RF antenna. Place to deploy.
spanish: Un botón momentáneo con antena RF. Colócalo para desplegar.
german: A momentary push button with RF antenna. Place to deploy.
russian: A momentary push button with RF antenna. Place to deploy.

original: A momentary push button with RF capability. Pulses power for 2 seconds, toggleable remotely via Intercom.
english: A momentary push button with RF capability. Pulses power for 2 seconds, toggleable remotely via Intercom.
spanish: Un botón momentáneo con capacidad RF. Pulsa energía durante 2 segundos, conmutable remotamente vía Intercomunicador.
german: A momentary push button with RF capability. Pulses power for 2 seconds, toggleable remotely via Intercom.
russian: A momentary push button with RF capability. Pulses power for 2 seconds, toggleable remotely via Intercom.

original: Automates crop watering. 5 u/s. Connect to Water Pump.
english: Automates crop watering. 5 u/s. Connect to Water Pump.
spanish: Automatiza el riego de cultivos. 5 u/s. Conectar a Bomba de Agua.
german: Automatisiert die Bewässerung. 5 u/s. An Wasserpumpe anschließen.
russian: Автоматизирует полив. 5 u/s. Подключить к водяному насосу.

original: A metal cradle that accepts car or truck batteries. Place to deploy.
english: A metal cradle that accepts car or truck batteries. Place to deploy.
spanish: Un soporte metálico que acepta baterías de coche o camión. Colocar para desplegar.
german: Eine Metallhalterung für Auto- oder LKW-Batterien. Platzieren zum Aufstellen.
russian: Металлическая подставка для автомобильных или грузовых аккумуляторов. Установите для развертывания.

original: Insert a Car Battery (1000u) or Truck Battery (3000u) to store energy. 15/25 chg, 20/35 dis.
english: Insert a Car Battery (1000u) or Truck Battery (3000u) to store energy. 15/25 chg, 20/35 dis.
spanish: Inserta una Batería de Coche (1000u) o Camión (3000u) para almacenar energía. 15/25 carga, 20/35 descarga.
german: Setzen Sie eine Auto-Batterie (1000u) oder LKW-Batterie (3000u) ein. 15/25 Ladung, 20/35 Entladung.
russian: Вставьте автомобильный (1000ед) или грузовой (3000ед) аккумулятор. 15/25 заряд, 20/35 разряд.

original: Kit to deploy an electric stove. Requires power.
english: Kit to deploy an electric stove. Requires power.
spanish: Kit para instalar una cocina eléctrica. Requiere electricidad.
german: Kit zum Aufstellen eines Elektroherds. Benötigt Strom.
russian: Набор для установки электроплиты. Требуется питание.

german: Elektroherd mit 4 unabhängigen Kochfeldern. Kochgeschirr oben platzieren. 10 u/s pro aktivem Brenner.
russian: Электроплита с 4 независимыми конфорками. Поставьте посуду сверху. 10 ед/с на активную конфорку.

original: A deployable Bitcoin ATM. Requires power.
english: A deployable Bitcoin ATM. Requires power.
spanish: Un cajero Bitcoin desplegable. Requiere electricidad.
german: A deployable Bitcoin ATM. Requires power.
russian: A deployable Bitcoin ATM. Requires power.

original: A Bitcoin ATM with live market prices.
english: A Bitcoin ATM with live market prices.
spanish: Un cajero Bitcoin con precios de mercado en vivo.
german: A Bitcoin ATM with live market prices.
russian: A Bitcoin ATM with live market prices.

original: Admin Bitcoin ATM. No power required.
english: Admin Bitcoin ATM. No power required.
spanish: Cajero Bitcoin de administrador. Sin electricidad.
german: Admin Bitcoin ATM. No power required.
russian: Admin Bitcoin ATM. No power required.

original: Admin Bitcoin ATM with live market prices.
english: Admin Bitcoin ATM with live market prices.
spanish: Cajero Bitcoin de administrador con precios de mercado en vivo.
german: Admin Bitcoin ATM with live market prices.
russian: Admin Bitcoin ATM with live market prices.

original: A PAS speaker. Receives megaphone audio when powered. Place to deploy.
english: A PAS speaker. Receives megaphone audio when powered. Place to deploy.
spanish: Altavoz PAS. Recibe audio de megafonía con energía. Colocar para desplegar.
german: PAS-Lautsprecher. Empfängt Megafon-Audio bei Stromversorgung. Platzieren zum Aufstellen.

english: PAS megaphone speaker. Toggle on/off. Receives audio from any PAS broadcaster. 5 u/s.
spanish: Altavoz de megafonía PAS. Encender/Apagar. Recibe audio de cualquier transmisor PAS. 5 u/s.
german: PAS-Megafon-Lautsprecher. Ein-/Ausschalten. Empfängt Audio von jedem PAS-Sender. 5 E/s.
russian: PAS-мегафонный динамик. Включение/выключение. Принимает аудио от любого PAS-передатчика. 5 ед/с.

original: Pair with RF switches, then activate to toggle them remotely. Range: 200m.

spanish: Empareja con interruptores RF y actívalos a distancia. Alcance: 200m.
